section_miscategorizations.text: The clinician notes tenderness to palpation in the right lower quadrant.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Tenderness to palpation is a physical exam finding and should be documented as an objective observation, not in the assessment section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The clinician will continue the patient on toprol, lisinopril, and lasix.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Continuation of existing medications reflects the current medication regimen rather than a new change or order; per instructions, current medications belong in the Subjective section unless framed as a treatment change.
